completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith backend with 5 active assemblies. Reminders/ stale scaffold excluded.
Found 8 existing docs in docs/ (all from Jan 2026), plus README.md and CLAUDE.md at root.
Tech stack: ASP.NET Core 8.0, Cosmos DB 3.46.1, Auth0 JWT, Ical.Net 5.2.0 (new), xUnit/Moq/FluentAssertions.

Exhaustive scan: 25 API operations (13 commands + 12 queries), 4 Cosmos DB document types + 1 computed model, 12 custom exceptions, 3 services, 3 repositories, 2 middleware, command pattern architecture.
Generated source-tree-analysis.md with annotated directory tree, assembly dependency graph, ★ NEW markers for recurring task additions.

Generated architecture.md covering assembly architecture, 4 document types, state machines, command catalog (13 commands), Unity operations, recurring task computation, DI registration, middleware pipeline, Cosmos DB design.
Generated project-overview.md with executive summary, tech stack table, architecture summary, API surface overview.
Generated api-contracts.md with all 13 commands, query endpoints, error codes, DTO reference.
Generated data-models.md with all 4 document types, computed model, state constants, 12 exceptions, service and repository layer documentation.
Generated development-guide.md with prerequisites, environment setup, build/test commands, adding commands and recurring task features, coding conventions, curl examples for all command categories.
Generated deployment-guide.md with CI/CD pipeline, Azure configuration, document types in container, monitoring, security headers, troubleshooting.
Generated index.md with all 13 commands listed, recurring task documentation links, updated AI-assisted development section covering recurring task computation model.
Validation passed: no TODO/PLACEHOLDER/TBD/FIXME markers found across all 8 documentation files.

changes_since_last_scan.new_feature: RecurringTask system (RRULE-based recurrence with computed instances)

project_types.display_name: ASP.NET Core Backend API with Command Pattern + Recurring Tasks
